summary: Completed testing of Multi-Admin Management feature (iteration 28). Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - Team tab visible ONLY for super_admin, AdminTeamManagement component working, domain validation (@fiscaltaxcanarie.com) enforced on invite form.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: Super Admin login working correctly for francesco@fiscaltaxcanarie.com and bruno@fiscaltaxcanarie.com with password 'Lanzarote1'
GET /api/admin/team correctly returns list of all admins (super_admin and admin roles)
POST /api/admin/invite correctly validates @fiscaltaxcanarie.com domain - rejects other domains with 400 error
PUT /api/admin/change-password correctly validates current password and minimum length (8 chars)
Team tab visibility correctly restricted to super_admin role only in CommercialDashboard
AdminTeamManagement component shows team members with role badges (Super Admin/Admin)
Frontend domain validation shows toast error 'L'email deve appartenere al dominio @fiscaltaxcanarie.com'
Legacy admin info@fiscaltaxcanarie.com is also super_admin - Team tab correctly visible
seed_data_creation: None - used existing super_admin accounts initialized by init_super_admins()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Admin Management feature fully functional. Three super_admin accounts exist: francesco@fiscaltaxcanarie.com, bruno@fiscaltaxcanarie.com, info@fiscaltaxcanarie.com. Team tab in CommercialDashboard visible only for super_admin role. Admin invite requires @fiscaltaxcanarie.com domain. Invite flow: POST /api/admin/invite creates token -> GET /api/admin/invite/verify/{token} validates -> POST /api/admin/activate creates account.

backend_api.GET /api/admin/team: ✓ Returns list of all admins with id, email, role, stato, profile_image
backend_api.POST /api/admin/invite - valid domain: ✓ Creates invite with token for @fiscaltaxcanarie.com emails
backend_api.POST /api/admin/invite - super_admin rol: ✓ Super admin can invite another super_admin
backend_api.POST /api/admin/upload-profile-image: ✓ Uploads and returns base64 profile image
backend_api.GET /api/admin/invite/verify/{token}: ✓ Returns invite details for valid token

frontend_ui.Membri del Team section: ✓ Shows 3 team members with avatars and role badges
frontend_ui.Role badges: ✓ Purple 'Super Admin' badge with ShieldCheck icon
frontend_ui.Domain validation error: ✓ Toast shows error for non-fiscaltaxcanarie.com emails
frontend_ui.Inviti in Attesa section: ✓ Shows pending invites with count badge

admin_roles_hierarchy.super_admin: Full access - can invite/delete admins, manage team, all admin features
admin_roles_hierarchy.admin: Admin access - same as super_admin but cannot invite/delete other admins
admin_roles_hierarchy.cliente: Client access - limited to own data
